titleStmt.title: SII 16.307: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 307. (A.R. No. 260 of 1916.) ŚRĪMUSHṆAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the first prākāra of the Bhūvarāha-perumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1525 (wrong for 1523), Plava, Phālguna śu. 10, corresponding to 1602 A.D., February 21, (Sunday).

It registers a grant of land in the village of Yaḷamaṅgala excluding the dēvamānya and sthāna-mānya lands formerly given by Achyutappa-nāyaka and Paḍigasāni, by the trustees of the temple, and Veṅkaṭa Rāvu Kōnēṭayya, the agent of Koṇḍamanāyani-Kṛishṇappa-nāyaka to one hundred and forty one servants (sēvugālavāru) of the temple of Ādivarāha at Śrīmushṇam for conducting services to the god on specified occasions.
Stipulates payment of cash (modalu) in liew of services by such of those servants who were not able to render their services to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1525 Agunēṭi plava saṁvatsara phālguṇa śu 10 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrī vīra veṁkaṭapatirāyadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru penugoṁḍanagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanā rūḍhulai pṛthivisāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmadakhi
lāṁḍakōṭibraṁhmāṁḍanāyakulayina śrīmuṣṇaṁ Ādivarāhasvāmi kōvila śrībhaṁḍāraṁ vāruṁnu koṁḍamanāyani kriṣṇappanāyanayyavāri kāryaka¨rtalayi
na veṁkaṭarāvu kōnēṭayyavāruṁnu kaṭṭaḍaśēśina maryādaśāsanamu Ādimū¨rti kōvila yeṁberumānāraḍiyā¨rlalōnu śēvagālu 141 ki pūrvamaṁdu Acyutappanāya
niṁgāru yaḷamaṁgalagrāmaṁ kaṭṭaḍaśēśināru ganaka Āgrāmānapūrvamayina dēvamānyasthānamānyāluṁnu paḍigasāni kaṭṭaḍaśēśina mānyaguṁṭalu 200 nnu kāka karicciki ka
ṭṭaḍaśēśina mānyaṁ guṁṭṭalu 40 nnikāka Ā grāmānannilicina phālaṁ kaliginadi 141 śēvugāla vāruṁnu sarigā paṁccukoni valasina payi¨rlu peṭṭukoni Ādimū¨rti śāva tappakuṁProbably this standsphalaṁ .
ḍā śēviṁccukoni savukhyāna vuṁḍakalavāru tiruvūralu tirunāḷlaku maṁṭapaṁ capparaṁ peṭṭiṁcci pūrvama¨ryyādanu carapuṁnu śāyakalavāru tērutirunāḷakuṁnnu samudra
tirunāḷakuṁnu śīma Appaṁdaṁ manuṣyula viḍuvakalavāru kōvila śēviṁccanivāri śēvagāla mānyaphalaṁ kōvilaku mōdalu peṭṭakalavāru yī śāsanaṁ vrāśina maryā
daku yavaṁḍu tappi vighnaṁśēśinānu Ā vighnaṁśēśinavāṁḍlu nūṭanaluvaivoka bhōgālavāṁḍla miṁḍalākoḍuku pōṁgalavāṁḍū gaṁgātīramaṁdu tama tallitaṁḍrini go
ṁtu kōsina pāpāna pōduru .
Digital edition of SII 16.307 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
